console_query: ContainerAppConsoleLogs_CL | where ContainerAppName_s == 'ca-diagsetting-7dcl4v' | summarize rows=count(), distinct_revisions=dcount(RevisionName_s)
system_query: ContainerAppSystemLogs_CL | where ContainerAppName_s == 'ca-diagsetting-7dcl4v' | summarize rows=count(), distinct_revisions=dcount(RevisionName_s)
